info.title: Reality Conversion
info.description: Convert mentioned point cloud formats to web-friendly Orbit Point Cloud.

post.description:
---

Create a new job. The POST request body MUST include type, name, inputs and outputs.

### Authentication

Requires `Authorization` header with valid Bearer token for scope `itwin-platform`.

For more documentation on authorization and how to get access token visit [OAUTH2 Authorization](https://developer.bentley.com/apis/overview/authorization/) page.

---

401.description: This response indicates that request lacks valid authentication credentials. Access token might not been provided, issued by the wrong issuer, does not have required scopes or request headers were malformed.

error.message: Header Authorization was not found in the request. Access denied.

403.description: This response indicates that user does not have required permissions to create a job.

error.message: The user has insufficient permissions for the requested operation.

422.description: The 422 (Unprocessable Entity) status code indicates that the request cannot be processed by the server due to a client error (e.g. malformed request syntax).

error.message: Cannot create job.

429.description: This response indicates that the client sent more requests than allowed by this API for the current tier of the client.

retry-after.description: Number of seconds to wait until client is allowed to make more requests.

error.message: The client sent more requests than allowed by this API for the current tier of the client.

get.description:
---

Retrieve list of jobs matching provided filter.

The `iTwinId` in filter is optional. If it is not provided, this will return jobs created by the same user. However, if the iTwinId is provided and the user has access to it, this will return jobs associated with that specific iTwin.

### Authentication

Requires `Authorization` header with valid Bearer token for scope `itwin-platform`.

For more documentation on authorization and how to get access token visit [OAUTH2 Authorization](https://developer.bentley.com/apis/overview/authorization/) page.

---

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description:
The $filter query option requests a specific set of jobs.
The given filter is evaluated for each job and only job where the filter evaluates to true are returned.
Properties supported for filtering: `id`, `iTwinId`, `name`, `email`, `type`, `state`, `createdDateTime`, `inputId`, `outputId`.
Supported operators: `eq`, `lt`, `le`, `gt`, `ge`, `ne`, `in`, `and`, `or`.
 Samples of $filter values:
`$filter=iTwinId eq dc720f05-e5f7-448b-ae06-765de46f0af1`
`$filter=inputId in ('482b2968-6a85-4e50-b05c-8acbf828c1bd', '14c03448-bea0-4d76-b53b-4b20bd3f4cbc')`
`$filter=id eq 9e2d27cf-b695-47e9-b7f0-0d47dc3b88ad`
`$filter=createdDateTime gt 2024-06-24T13:00:00Z`

parameters.name: continuationToken
parameters.description: Parameter that enables continuing to the next page of the previous paged query. This must be passed exactly as it is in the response body's _links.next property.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: The number of reality conversion jobs to get in each page. Max 1000, but 100 is the default if this parameter is not included.

401.description: This response indicates that request lacks valid authentication credentials. Access token might not been provided, issued by the wrong issuer, does not have required scopes or request headers were malformed.

error.message: Header Authorization was not found in the request. Access denied.
Requested iTwin is not available.

422.description: The 422 (Unprocessable Entity) status code indicates that the request cannot be processed by the server due to a client error (e.g. malformed request syntax).

error.message: Cannot find jobs.

details.message: The $top query parameter value must be a positive integer that does not exceed 1000.

429.description: This response indicates that the client sent more requests than allowed by this API for the current tier of the client.

retry-after.description: Number of seconds to wait until client is allowed to make more requests.

error.message: The client sent more requests than allowed by this API for the current tier of the client.

For more documentation on authorization and how to get access token visit [OAUTH2 Authorization](https://developer.bentley.com/apis/overview/authorization/) page.

patch.description:
---

Patch can be used for changing the job state (to active or cancelled), options or changing cost estimation parameters.

### Authentication

Requires `Authorization` header with valid Bearer token for scope `itwin-platform`.

For more documentation on authorization and how to get access token visit [OAUTH2 Authorization](https://developer.bentley.com/apis/overview/authorization/) page.

---

401.description: This response indicates that request lacks valid authentication credentials. Access token might not been provided, issued by the wrong issuer, does not have required scopes or request headers were malformed.

error.message: Header Authorization was not found in the request. Access denied.
Requested job is not available.

422.description: The 422 (Unprocessable Entity) status code indicates that the request cannot be processed by the server due to a client error (e.g. malformed request syntax).

error.message: Cannot modify job.

details.message: Cannot resubmit an already submitted job.

429.description: This response indicates that the client sent more requests than allowed by this API for the current tier of the client.

retry-after.description: Number of seconds to wait until client is allowed to make more requests.

error.message: The client sent more requests than allowed by this API for the current tier of the client.

delete.description:
---

Delete an unsubmitted job. Job will not be deleted once it is in active state.

### Authentication

Requires `Authorization` header with valid Bearer token for scope `itwin-platform`.

For more documentation on authorization and how to get access token visit [OAUTH2 Authorization](https://developer.bentley.com/apis/overview/authorization/) page.

---

401.description: This response indicates that request lacks valid authentication credentials. Access token might not been provided, issued by the wrong issuer, does not have required scopes or request headers were malformed.

error.message: Header Authorization was not found in the request. Access denied.
Requested job is not available.

422.description: Job cannot be deleted once it has been submitted.

error.message: Cannot delete job.

details.message: Cannot delete an already submitted job.

jobCreation.title: Job (Create)

inputs.description: List of inputs of the job.

outputs.description: List of output formats of the job.

jobCreation.description: Model for creating a new job.

id.description: Reality data Id of the input.

jobCreateOutput.title: Job Output (Job Create)
jobCreateOutput.description:
Specifies the output formats for the job.

- Allowed values are defined in the `PointCloudOutputs` and `VectorOutputs` schemas.
- If the input is a point cloud type, only values from PointCloudOutputs are valid.
- If the input is a vector type, only values from VectorOutputs are valid.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Last modification date of the job.

inputs.description: List of inputs of the job.

outputs.description: List of outputs of a job.

jobType.title: Job Type
jobType.description:
Possible values:
- Conversion: Converts input data from one format to another.
- ImportFeatures: Takes vector inputs and imports features into a feature class of Geospatial Features API. Use `FDB` as the output format for this type.

PointCloudInputs.title: Point Cloud Input Formats
PointCloudInputs.description: List of available input formats for point cloud conversion.

VectorInputs.title: Vector Input Formats
VectorInputs.description: List of available input formats for vector conversion.

TileMapInputs.title: Tile Map Input Formats
TileMapInputs.description: Input types representing raster or tiled datasets for generating tile maps.

id.description: Reality data Id of the input.

PointCloudOutputs.title: Point Cloud Output Formats
PointCloudOutputs.description:
List of available point cloud output formats.
- OPC: Orbit Point Cloud
- PNTS: OGC 3DTiles Point Cloud 1.0
- GLB: OGC 3DTiles Point Cloud 1.1
- GLBC: OGC 3DTiles Point Cloud 1.1 Compressed.

VectorOutputs.title: Vector Output Formats
VectorOutputs.description:
List of available vector output formats.

 - Use FDB as the output format when the job type is ImportFeatures.

TileMapOutputs.title: Tile Map Output Formats
TileMapOutputs.description: List of available tile map output formats.

id.description: Reality data Id of the output.

processingEngines.description: Number of engines to be used at most, between 0 and your engine limit. If set at 0, RCS will use your engine limit.

merge.description: If true, then all the input files from multiple containers will be merged into one output file. Otherwise, creates one output per input file. Valid only for Conversion jobs.

inputSRS.description: EPSG code for the spatial reference system of input files (horizontal or horizontal+vertical).

outputSRS.description: EPSG code for the spatial reference system of output files (horizontal or horizontal+vertical).

sampleWorldStep.description: Sampling step size in meters for traversing triangles in mesh geometry. Default is 0.125. Only valid for Cesium3DTiles input.

featureClassDisplayName.description: Name of the feature class to create in the Geospatial Features API. If omitted, uses the input reality data display name. Only valid for ImportFeatures jobs.

topLevel.description: Top level of the tile map to generate. Default is -1 (single tile for all input data). Only valid for TileMap output.

bottomLevel.description: Bottom level of the tile map to generate. Default is -1 (closest to native resolution). Only valid for TileMap output.

tileFormat.description: Tile format for the tile map. Supported values are 'JPG' (default) and 'PNG'. Only valid for TileMap output.

jpgQuality.description: Quality of JPG tiles to generate (10–99). Default is 85. Only valid for TileMap output.

backgroundColor.description: Background color to use for tiles, in 'r.g.b' where r,g,b (red,green,blue) are values 0..255, default value is '255.255.255' (white). Only valid for TileMap output.

costEstimationParameters.title: Cost Estimation Parameters
costEstimationParameters.description: Parameters to be used to estimate the cost of the job.

costEstimation.title: Cost Estimation Information

gigaPixels.description: Number of giga pixels in inputs.

megaPoints.description: Number of mega points in inputs.

estimatedCost.description: Estimated cost of the job using the CostEstimationParameters.

costEstimation.description: Cost estimate based on parameters before job processing.

next-page-link.title: Next Page Link
next-page-link.description: URL for getting the next page of data, if applicable.

JobStateModify.title: Modify Job State

state.title: Job State
state.description: Set to 'active' to start processing the job, or 'cancelled' to cancel the running job.

JobStateModify.description: Request model for updating the state of a job. Use to start processing or cancel a running job.

JobModify.title: Modify Job
JobModify.description: PATCH model for updating job properties. All properties are optional; only provided fields will be updated.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: Optional array of more specific errors.

DetailedError.description: Contains error information and an array of more specific errors.

DetailedErrorResponse.title: Detailed Error Response
DetailedErrorResponse.description: Gives details for an error that occurred while handling the request. Note that clients MUST NOT assume that every failed request will produce an object of this schema, or that all of the properties in the response will be non-null, as the error may have prevented this response from being constructed.

code.description: One of a server-defined set of error codes.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

ErrorResponse.title: Error Response
ErrorResponse.description: Gives details for an error that occurred while handling the request. Note that clients MUST NOT assume that every failed request will produce an object of this schema, or that all of the properties in the response will be non-null, as the error may have prevented this response from being constructed.
